exploration_notes: Rewrote the observeApiError function in packages/metrics/lib/observeApiError.ts to match all requirements: (1) Takes exactly two parameters: error (any) and metricObserver (function accepting MetricsApiStatusTypes). (2) MetricsApiStatusTypes accepts '4xx', '5xx', and 'failure'. (3) If error is falsy, calls metricObserver('failure'). (4) If error.status >= 500, calls metricObserver('5xx').
